top.title: Rationing power and diluting petrol - how African countries are coping with effects of Iran war
top.summary: The disruption in oil supplies has caused shortages and concerns in several African countries.

top.title: Panic buying prompts PM to reassure Australians over fuel supply
top.summary: Anthony Albanese says nation's supply remains "secure" amid reports of panic buying and shortages.

top.title: Two Cuba-bound aid ships missing after leaving Mexico
top.summary: Mexico's navy launches a rescue mission for ships delivering aid to Cuba, strained by food and fuel shortages amid a US embargo.

top.title: Judge rejects Pentagon's attempt to 'cripple' Anthropic
top.summary: A federal judge told the government it could not immediately enforce a ban on Anthropic’s tools.

top.title: Elon Musk's X advertising boycott lawsuit dismissed by US judge
top.summary: US District Judge Jane Boyle said the company had failed to show it had suffered any harm under federal competition laws.

top.title: 'A game-changing moment for social media' - what next for big tech after landmark addiction verdict?
top.summary: The ruling could be the beginning of the end of social media as we know it, writes the BBC's technology editor Zoe Kleinman.

title.#text: Judge sides with Anthropic to temporarily block the Pentagon’s ban
